name: 8 盎司火烤德州牛排 8 OZ Sirloin
desc:
8 盎司。特選牛排。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
8 oz. Selected steak. Served with one side dish.

name: 嫩烤鮭魚排 Grilled Salmon
desc:
香煎鮭魚排, 獨家檸檬胡椒奶油及塔塔醬。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Pan-fried salmon, special lemon and ground pepper with cream sauce, and tartar sauce. Served with one side dish.

name: 6 盎司火烤德州牛排 6 OZ Sirloin
desc:
特選牛排。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Selected steak. Served with one side dish.

name: 凱薩沙拉 Caesar Salad
desc:
蘿蔓生菜, 帕瑪森起司, 起司麵包丁及自製凱薩醬。
Romaine Lettuce, parmesan cheese, cheese croutons, and homemade caesar sauce.

name: 6 盎司達拉斯菲力牛排 6 OZ Dallas Filet
desc:
6 盎司。若牛排熟度選擇七分熟或全熟,烹調過程會將牛排做蝴蝶切。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
6 oz. Steak will be butterfly cut if steak doneness is medium well or well done. Served with one side dish.

name: 半份冠軍豬肋排 Half Slab Award Winning Ribs
desc:
附招牌 BBQ 醬。半份。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Served with signature BBQ sauce. Half slab. Served with 1 side dish.

name: 12 盎司肋眼牛排 12 OZ Rib Eye
desc:
特選牛排。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Selected steak. Served with one side dish.

name: 12 盎司肋眼牛排 12 OZ Ribeye
desc:
附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Served with one side dish.

name: 美國大聯盟 All American Cheese Burger
desc:
8 盎司特選美國手工漢堡肉, 美國起司, 美生菜, 蕃茄, 生菜及生洋蔥。附酸黃瓜與厚切薯條。
8 oz selected American handmade patty, American cheese, iceberg lettuce, tomato and raw onion. Served with pickled cucumber and thick cut French fries.

name: 嫩煎鱸魚 Pan Seared Seabass
desc:
海鱸魚排, 特製香料, 檸檬胡椒奶油醬。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Seabass chop, special spices, and lemon and ground pepper with cream sauce. Served with one side dish.

name: 黃金雞柳條 Chicken Critter
desc:
鮮嫩多汁雞柳條，裹上獨家特製麵衣，酥炸至金黃色，搭配與蜂蜜芥末醬。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
All white-meat chicken tenders, hand-dipped in our signature batter and fried to a crispy golden brown. Served with seasoned steak fries, honey mustard.

name: 波隆納肉醬義大利麵 Bolognese Beef Pasta
desc:
義大利斜管麵, 特選美國牛絞肉, 蕃茄, 洋蔥, 香蒜及帕瑪森起司。
Italian penne, selected American ground beef, tomato, onion, garlic, and parmesan cheese.

name: 菲力牛排沙拉 Steakhouse Salad
desc:
鮮嫩菲力牛排 (6 盎司), 綜合鮮脆生菜, 義式油醋醬, 藍乳酪碎丁, 香脆培根丁, 紅洋蔥丁, 新鮮蕃茄丁及香脆起司麵包丁。
Tenderloin steak (6oz), assorted lettuce, Italian vinaigrette sauce, diced bleu cheese, crispy diced bacon, diced onion, diced tomato, and crispy diced cheese bread.

name: 美國特選酥炸牛排 Country Fried Steak
desc:
特選 6 盎司沙朗牛排裹上特製麵衣後酥炸，佐香濃白奶油醬 (固定搭配)。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Hand-battered, fresh-cut 6oz. Sirloin served crispy and golden, topped with cream gravy. Served with one side dish.

name: 厚切無骨豬排 Grilled Pork Chop
desc:
厚切特選無骨豬排及醬料。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
Thick cut selected boneless pork chop and sauce. Served with one side dish.

name: 德州風味炸雞 Fried Chicken
desc:
德州風味炸雞裹上特製麵糊炸至表層酥脆, 佐以濃郁的白醬, 鮮嫩多汁的口感讓您大呼過癮。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
All white-meat chicken tenders, hand-dipped in our signature batter and fried to a crispy golden brown. Served with your choice of dipping sauce. Served with one side dish.

name: 香辣紐奧良烤蝦麵 Cajun Shrimp Pasta
desc:
義大利斜管麵佐紐奧良辣味特製奶油醬, 搭配香料烤蝦, 蘑菇, 紅甜椒及帕馬森起司絲。
Grilled seasoned shrimp served on penne pasta tossed with mushroom and red bell pepper in a Cajun spiced cream sauce. Topped with shredded parmesan cheese.

name: 德州辣雞翅 Smoked Buffalo Wings
desc:
鮮炸香酥雞翅裹上經典辣醬，佐西洋芹及藍乳酪醬。
Lightly smoked chicken wings tossed in our wing sauce (mild). Served with celery sticks and Bleu Cheese dressing.

name: 德州辣味雞柳沙拉 Buffalo Chicken Salad
desc:
香脆雞柳條裹上辣味醬汁，搭配綜合鮮脆生菜，傑克起司、切達起司、水煮蛋丁、新鮮蕃茄丁及香脆培根丁。
Hot crispy strips of chicken tossed in buffalo sauce (mild) and piled high on a bed of cold greens with shredded jack & cheddar cheese, diced tomatoes, chopped eggs and crumbled bacon.

name: 8 盎司火烤德州牛排 8 OZ Sirloin
desc:
8 盎司。特選牛排。附 1 道鮮製配菜。
8 oz. Selected steak. Served with one side dish.
